title: December 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 22''' is the 356th day of the year (357th in leap years). There are 9 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Brian Daley]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Tony Isabella]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Hugh Quarshie]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[David S. Goyer]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Andy Mangels]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Jarrett J. Krosoczka]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 79|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 79]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Morgan Upton]] dies.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 13|''Star Wars'' (1998) 13]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace 1|''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 1]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Shades of Gray]]" is released on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2010]] – [[Invasion: Rescues 6|''Invasion: Rescues'' 6]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Storybook Library]]'' announced as being published on this date.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Insider 162|''Star Wars Insider'' 162]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Missing Agent]]" airs on the [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Vow of Silver Dawn]]'' chapters ten and eleven are published.
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 19|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 19]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Trail of Shadows 3|''The High Republic: Trail of Shadows'' 3]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Disney 100: A Century of Dreams]]'' airs on [[Disney+]].
